nasb.text: Now therefore send, bring your livestock and whatever you have in the field to safety. Every man and beast that is found in the field and is not brought home, when the hail comes down on them, will die.” ’ ”

esv.text: Now therefore send, get your livestock and all that you have in the field into safe shelter, for every man and beast that is in the field and is not brought home will die when the hail falls on them.”’”

cnv.text: 所以，你現在要派人去，把你的牲畜和田間所有屬於你的，都收聚到安全的地方；因為凡在田間發現的人和牲畜而不收回家裡去的，冰雹必落在他們身上，他們就必死亡。”’”

ccb.text: 现在，你要叫人赶快到田间把牲畜和属于你的一切都带到安全的地方。凡留在田间的人或牲畜都会被冰雹打死。’”
